name: Tres Trapi
description: One of the most reliable places to snorkel with sea turtles from shore. Bright blue whiptail lizards and pelicans on the rocks add to the scene.

rockiness.beach: Rocky limestone point — no sand beach; concrete steps into water
rockiness.ocean_floor: Sandy bottom just beyond steps; turtles often on sand patches 🪸

live_rating.water_quality_note: Provisional estimate — not lab-tested; live water quality later

characteristics.depth_profile: Concrete steps into deep water quickly — turtles often rest on sandy bottom just beyond roped swim area.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Rocky point — not a sand beach; steps carved into limestone
characteristics.access: Roadside parking on northwest coast near Malmok
fun_facts: One of the most reliable places to snorkel with sea turtles from shore.
Bright blue whiptail lizards and pelicans on the rocks add to the scene.
Often combined with Boca Catalina and Arashi for a north-coast snorkel morning.
safety_notes: Watch current; rash guard recommended; stay within marked swim zones.
